scripts.test: node --check .codex/cloud/controller-constants.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/controller-backlog.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/controller-progress.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/build-controller-prompt.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/health-check.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/remote-gate.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/reconcile-controller-pr.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/scheduler.mjs && node --check .codex/cloud/monitor-scheduler.mjs && for f in aneety-platform/apps/*/worker-*/scripts/validate-publication-evidence.mjs aneety-platform/apps/gateway-borda/worker-gateway/scripts/validate-publication-evidence.mjs; do [ -f "$f" ] && node --check "$f"; done && for f in .codex/cloud/*.sh; do bash -n "$f"; done && node --test .codex/cloud/tests/*.test.mjs
